expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Several horizontal sections are clipped on the right edge. The top category tab shows only part of “Hot Games,” and the rightmost game cards are cut off in multiple rows.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the last visible row of game tiles.
The hero carousel navigation arrows sit very close to the screen edges, with the right arrow appearing partially clipped.
Some game cards and category chips appear tightly cropped with little breathing room, making the layout feel crowded on the right side.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a missing responsible gaming icon from the top nav bar; all reported issues focus on clipping, overlap, and spacing problems.
